title: CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a weekly playgroup for parents and their children. Chxi San means "New Day" in Chinook Wawa. Provides culturally focused, child-centered, and developmentally appropriate play in a structured environment. Provides culturally appropriate snacks during playgroup. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Parents and their children 6 weeks-5 years. Primarily serves self-identified Native Americans. Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 282-2599 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (503) 282-2599 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Walk-ins accepted during playgroup times. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Parent/Child Activity Groups * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICRO ENTERPRISE EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MANY NATIONS ACADEMY EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH EQUITY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS YOUTH SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NAYA GENERATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER CARE SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE INDIAN PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS AND SEASONAL PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CULTURAL ARTS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
